user.title: Lanternator Setup
user.description: Configure a porch lantern automation with ambient light control.

data_description.relay: The switch entity controlling power to the smart bulb.
data_description.light: The smart bulb entity managed by this automation.
data_description.lux_sensor: A sensor providing ambient light readings in lux.
data_description.override: When ON, the automation is disabled.
data_description.lux_threshold: Lux level below which the light should be ON (hysteresis ±5 applied automatically).
data_description.debounce_seconds: How long the lux condition must persist before acting.
data_description.polling_minutes: Safety polling interval to verify and restore the desired state.
data_description.brightness: Optional: fixed brightness when turning on the bulb.
data_description.color_temp: Optional: fixed color temperature in mireds.
data_description.rgb_color_r: Optional: red channel for RGB color.
data_description.rgb_color_g: Optional: green channel for RGB color.
data_description.rgb_color_b: Optional: blue channel for RGB color.
